valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 17 Feb 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 18 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: Low moving slowly northeast expected just west of Rockall 981 by midday tomorrow. New low expected FitzRoy 991 by same time. Low German Bight 1001 losing its identity
